name: Buddy Review Context Loader
description: A deterministic Buddy runtime tool that reconstructs memory-review inputs from a source Buddy graph run stored in the database.

inputSchema.name: Source Run ID
inputSchema.description: Completed visible Buddy run id that triggered this background review.

outputSchema.name: Current Session ID
outputSchema.description: Buddy session id resolved from the source run metadata or source run state.

outputSchema.name: User Message
outputSchema.description: User message reconstructed from the source run state.

outputSchema.name: Conversation History
outputSchema.description: Conversation history state from the source run, normally a context_package with a nested context_assembly_ref.

outputSchema.name: Request Understanding
outputSchema.description: Structured request understanding state from the source run.

outputSchema.name: Capability Result
outputSchema.description: Capability result package from the source run.

outputSchema.name: Capability Review
outputSchema.description: Capability review state from the source run.

outputSchema.name: Public Response
outputSchema.description: Final visible Buddy response reconstructed from source run state, outputs, or final_result.

outputSchema.name: Review Context Report
outputSchema.description: Audit report describing how review inputs were reconstructed.
